CustomField.description: Identifies the single Rent Schedule that drives rent values on the Contract. [LOAD:Yes] [JUSTIFICATION: To identify the primary rent schedule for a contract] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API: NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API: NA] [COMMENTS: NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select this checkbox to mark this Rent Schedule as the Primary Rent Schedule for the Contract. Only one Rent Schedule under a Contract can be marked as Primary. Fields- Base Rent, Current Rent and Applicable Rent on Contract will be automatically populated based on the values from this Primary Rent Schedule.
CustomField.label: Primary Rent Schedule
